name: run-to-green
description: Orchestrator's ledger when the user asks to drive an IP from scratch to a green pipeline. Each task represents a dispatch + evidence-wait + gate-check. The orchestrator does not author artifacts — it only dispatches workers and inspects evidence. Tasks unlock as upstream gates pass.

tasks.content: [ORCH] Read pipeline state and route mode
tasks.detail: Read /api/pipeline/state?ip=<ip>. Pick Run Mode (starter/engineering/signoff) and Exec Mode (single-worker/orchestrator). Decide DAG scope: full DAG up to goal-audit by default; skip syn/sta/pnr/sta-post unless signoff mode.
tasks.criteria:
pipeline_state.json captured
run_mode and exec_mode recorded in orchestrator_state.json

tasks.content: [ORCH] Dispatch ssot-gen and verify SSOT validates
tasks.detail: Call /dispatch ssot-gen <ip>. Wait for evidence at <ip>/yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml. Run check_ssot_disk.sh invariants. If validator fails, retry up to ssot-gen budget (3); if still failing, /escalate.
tasks.criteria:
yaml/<ip>.ssot.yaml exists
require_top_sub_module_consistency passes
filelist.rtl includes top_module.file

tasks.content: [ORCH] Dispatch fl-model-gen and cl-model-gen in parallel
tasks.detail: Independent stages — dispatch both. Wait for both to pass. fl/cl gates: model/functional_model.py and model/cycle_model.py exist and self-check passes.
tasks.criteria:
model/functional_model.py exists
model/cycle_model.py exists
FL/CL self-check returns 0

tasks.content: [ORCH] Dispatch equiv-goals and confirm 100% required goals derived
tasks.detail: Call /dispatch equiv-goals <ip>. Verify verify/equivalence_goals.json has required=blocked=0.

Run python3 workflow/ip-contract/scripts/derive_ip_contract.py <ip> --root . after SSOT and equivalence goals exist. This derives capabilities, required monitors, mutation obligations, observables, and required evidence from the IP artifacts; do not select a static profile.

tasks.content: [ORCH] Dispatch rtl-gen (packet-parallel), verify compile + lint clean
tasks.detail: Call /dispatch rtl-gen <ip> with packet-parallel mode if exec_mode=orchestrator. Produce canonical DUT compile/lint evidence, run refresh_rtl_provenance.py after evidence updates, then rerun derive_rtl_todos.py --audit-rtl as the final RTL gate. If failed, /retry up to rtl-gen budget (5). If exhausted, /escalate.
tasks.criteria:
rtl/*.sv generated
python3 workflow/rtl-gen/scripts/rtl_compile_report.py <ip> --project-root . passes
python3 workflow/lint/scripts/dut_lint_report.py <ip> passes
python3 workflow/rtl-gen/scripts/refresh_rtl_provenance.py <ip> --root . passes
python3 workflow/rtl-gen/scripts/derive_rtl_todos.py <ip> --root . --audit-rtl reports gate.status=pass

tasks.content: [ORCH] Dispatch tb-gen and verify TB compile + scoreboard manifest
tasks.detail: Call /dispatch tb-gen <ip>. Before simulation, run the canonical TB Python compile gate so generated string/syntax errors fail cheaply and do not masquerade as simulator issues.
tasks.criteria:
tb/cocotb/test_runner.py exists
tb_manifest.json.top == SSOT.top_module.name
python3 workflow/tb-gen/scripts/check_tb_python_compile.py <ip> --root . passes and writes tb/cocotb/tb_py_compile.json

tasks.content: [ORCH] Dispatch sim and route on outcome
tasks.detail: Call /dispatch sim <ip>. If cocotb PASS with 0 mismatches → next stage. If mismatches → /dispatch sim_debug then /route by owner.
Run the canonical scoreboard gate after simulation. This now checks structured rows, FL source contract, and that signal-like expected_contract.observables appear in rtl_observed.

tasks.content: [ORCH] Route sim_debug owners and loop until convergence or escalation
tasks.detail: Read sim/mismatch_classification.json. For each owner: rtl_bug → /dispatch rtl-gen (targeted), tb_bug → /dispatch tb-gen, frontier → /escalate. Loop sim → sim_debug → route. Stop on retry budget exhaustion or cumulative cap (40 dispatches).
tasks.criteria:
mismatch_classification.json owner counts converge to 0
or escalation card written under <ip>/review/

tasks.content: [ORCH] Run coverage and close gaps via tb-gen loop
tasks.detail: Call /dispatch coverage <ip>. If gaps, /dispatch tb-gen with coverage_gap reason; loop with budget=2.
tasks.criteria: cov/coverage.json full per Run Mode threshold

tasks.content: [ORCH] Run mutation guard for harness depth
tasks.detail: Run the deterministic mutation guard as advisory evidence. Survived mutants become TB/coverage/observable follow-up work; do not edit locked truth to improve kill-rate.
Call /dispatch goal-audit <ip>. If passed → report Pipeline complete · X/Y passed. If failed → /escalate (final approval).

tasks.content: [ORCH] (signoff mode only) Drive syn → sta → pnr → sta-post chain
tasks.detail: Only when Run Mode == signoff and goal-audit passed. Dispatch syn, then sta and pnr in parallel, then sta-post. Re-run goal-audit if any sign-off evidence updates.
tasks.criteria:
syn/sta/pnr/sta-post evidence files all show pass
goal-audit re-run still pass
